description_long: This airplane features a compact, angular fuselage with a weathered gray finish accented by blue and red racing stripes along the wings and body. The wings are straight and extend widely from the central body, with no visible dihedral or winglets, and display a slightly swept-back design. The nose is blunt and squared, with a prominent intake or exhaust port beneath, while the rear features a wide, blue-tinted exhaust or engine outlet. The tail is integrated into the fuselage with no distinct vertical or horizontal stabilizers visible, giving it a futuristic, minimalist appearance. The surface appears metallic and worn, suggesting heavy use or exposure to the elements. There are no visible windows, cockpit details, or landing gear, emphasizing a streamlined, utilitarian design.
description: A compact, angular airplane with a weathered gray body, blue and red stripes, wide straight wings, and a blunt nose with a prominent intake. The design is minimalist and futuristic, lacking visible cockpit or landing gear details.
description_view_0: Front view shows the blunt, squared nose, central intake, and wide, straight wings with blue and red stripes.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the angular fuselage profile, absence of visible cockpit windows, and the prominent intake/exhaust at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the wide, blue-tinted exhaust or engine outlet and the full wingspan with racing stripes.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the same angular profile and lack of visible cockpit or landing gear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight, slightly swept-back wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_tail_design: No distinct vertical or horizontal stabilizers; tail is integrated into the fuselage with a minimalist design.
attribute_cockpit_placement: No visible cockpit or windows; cockpit placement indeterminate
